notes: Paged cache refcount leak fixed: completed-request blocks now enter the free LRU queue while staying hash-resident, so prefix hits can revive them and memory pressure can reclaim them (PR #68, @rsnow). Plus all v1.3.47 fixes (Gemma 4 MoE switch_mlp GH#71, Qwen3-VL grid_thw GH#69). 15-model regression matrix re-run under PR #68 — all green.
